title: Social Video Downloader Input
description: Extract video download URLs and metadata from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, and Facebook. Paste video URLs and get direct download links with full metadata. No API keys needed.

urls.title: Video URLs
urls.description: List of social media video URLs to extract. Supports YouTube (videos + Shorts), TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram (Reels + posts), and Facebook. Paste as many URLs as needed -- bulk processing supported.

includeMetadata.title: Include Metadata
includeMetadata.description: Include video metadata (title, author, thumbnail URL, duration in seconds) alongside the download URL. Disable for faster processing if you only need the video URL.
